features.name: Category Filters
features.description: Provides Single Choice and Multi Choice filters for categorical and multi-value columns, letting users narrow table data by selecting one or multiple category values.
features.evidence_summary: Both functions share the 'filter' role and target categorical column selection, differing only in single vs multi-value semantics.

features.name: Table Summary Viewer
features.description: A viewer that displays an at-a-glance summary of a data table, suitable for dashboards and quick data exploration.
features.evidence_summary: TableSummary carries a standalone 'viewer' role with no closely related functions in the package.

features.name: Time Widget
features.description: A home-page widget that displays the current time, serving as a reference implementation for building dashboard widgets.
features.evidence_summary: TimeWidget is a canonical home-page widget paired directly with the 'Develop widgets for home page' developer guide.

features.name: Multi Curve Viewer
features.description: A viewer for rendering multiple curves in a single chart, documented in the platform help pages.
features.evidence_summary: Dedicated help page titled 'Multi curve viewer' implies a distinct viewer feature; no matching registered function appears in this package's current metadata snapshot.

features.name: Custom Value Editors
features.description: Demonstrates how to register custom input editors for semantic types, allowing plugins to supply specialised UI controls for domain-specific column values.
features.evidence_summary: fooInput (valueEditor for semType 'foo') and inputDemo share the input/editor theme and together illustrate the custom-editor registration pattern.
